Key results from my work include:
* a detailed analysis of the heating generated by [nanoflares in coronal arcades](publications.html#arcade_heating);
* confirming that the heating produced in MHD avalanches [can self-consistently sustain](publications.html#1d_heating) coronal conditions against thermodynamic losses;
* [establishing](publications.html#avalanche1) the viability of MHD avalanches as a mechanism for coronal heating based on photospheric motions.
